workstreams.title: Legal manufacturer, governance, and intended-use lock
exit_criteria: legal manufacturer and accountable roles are appointed
one initial market and evidence-backed intended use are approved
claims and operating envelope are frozen under change control

workstreams.title: Model, data, license, and clinical-evidence execution
exit_criteria: commercially permitted representative data are accepted
a reproducible model candidate is frozen
preregistered internal, external, and prospective evidence meets approved criteria

workstreams.title: Operational quality management system
exit_criteria: controlled procedures are approved and effective
personnel and suppliers are qualified
internal audit and management review demonstrate an effective QMS

workstreams.title: Risk management and independent software verification
exit_criteria: requirements, risks, controls, and tests are completely traced
independent verification passes on the frozen release
anomalies and residual risks receive qualified approval

workstreams.title: Cybersecurity and privacy qualification
exit_criteria: production data flows, contracts, access, retention, and DPIA are approved
independent security testing has no unjustified critical or high finding
incident, restore, patch, and disclosure operations are exercised

workstreams.title: Regulatory classification, submission, and authorization
exit_criteria: classification and pathway are documented for each launch market
submission deficiencies are closed
authorization, registration, and approved labeling are effective

workstreams.title: Human factors, labeling, training, and competency
exit_criteria: formative findings are closed
summative validation has no unexplained critical use error
approved labeling and competent-user records exist

workstreams.title: Site installation, operational, and performance qualification
exit_criteria: site-specific IQ, OQ, and PQ pass with deviations closed
restore, rollback, load, downtime, and security tests pass
manufacturer and site acceptance are signed

workstreams.title: Postmarket surveillance and response operations
exit_criteria: staffed intake, reporting, CAPA, field-action, and cybersecurity routes exist
release baseline, telemetry, thresholds, and installed-base inventory are approved
incident and recall simulations pass

workstreams.title: Daily professional use and clinical operations
exit_criteria: only trained named users can access the approved site release
start-of-day, per-case, exception, downtime, and end-of-day controls are effective
laboratory leadership accepts the workflow and escalation paths
